subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-12-30
subcodes.first_line: Yes, since they have disobeyed the blessed instructions [of Baha'u'llah]. Only a few countries have representatives in the League of Nations, whereas the representatives must be appointed and ratified by the nation
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی زیرا بموجب دستور مبارک عمل نکرده اند در مجمع اتفاق ملل فقط چند دولت
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @predictions and prophecies, @power of faith; power of the spirit
